item.title: [General] Rank Higher with Targeted Golf Driver Pages #shorts

item.title: [General] Lead Generation for Digital Agencies: 15 Proven Strategies to Get More Qualified Clients
item.description: Digital agencies face an awkward problem: they are often excellent at generating leads for clients, but inconsistent at generating leads for themselves. That gap usually has nothing to do with talent. It comes from positioning, process, and focus. Agencies know dozens of channels, platforms, and

item.title: [General] KitKat Canada’s Easter Security Convoy After the 12-Ton Chocolate Heist: What Happened, Why It Worked, and What Brands Can Learn
item.description: When a real supply-chain theft becomes public, most brands default to controlled statements, legal caution, and operational cleanup. That is usually the correct response. What made the recent KitKat Canada security convoy story different is that the brand did not stop at damage control. Instead,

item.title: [General] Livvy Dunne and Accelerator Active Energy Brand Refresh: New Can Design, Cotton Candy Sales, and the “This Can. So You Can.” Campaign
item.description: Accelerator Active Energy has rolled out a brand refresh built around brighter can designs, a new campaign platform, and a more explicit bet on athlete-led brand building. At the center of the rollout is Livvy Dunne, who is not only a public face for the brand but also an investor with a direct r

item.title: [General] Budweiser Budstalgia Campaign: 40 Years of FIFA World Cup Sponsorship, the 2026 Anniversary Pack, and What It Means for Fans
item.description: Budweiser’s “Budstalgia” campaign is not just another tournament promotion. It is a brand-history play built around one of the most recognized long-running relationships in global sports marketing: Budweiser’s four decades as an official FIFA World Cup sponsor. With the 2026 tournament approachin

item.title: [General] Ford Raptor Daniel Ricciardo Short Film: Inside Wieden+Kennedy’s “A Raptor Meets Honey Badger” Campaign
item.description: Ford’s latest Raptor campaign with Daniel Ricciardo is not trying to behave like a traditional car commercial. That is the first thing worth understanding, and it is also the reason the short film has drawn attention well beyond automotive circles. Rather than building the whole message around ho

item.title: [General] Liquid Death x Pit Viper Collaboration: Price, Features, Sellout Details, and Why the Limited Drop Worked
item.description: Liquid Death and Pit Viper did not release a typical product collaboration. They released a limited-edition pair of sunglasses called “Sunglasses for Dead People” and presented them as a real solution for the afterlife. The premise was absurd on purpose, but the product itself was real, purchasab

item.title: [General] Kikkoman’s “Unleash Legendary” Campaign: Anime, Teriyaki, and the Gen Z Home Cook
item.description: Kikkoman’s new “Unleash Legendary” campaign is more than an anime-inspired ad push. It is a carefully timed attempt to modernize how teriyaki is presented, clarify how different sauces fit different cooking occasions, and make a heritage Japanese brand feel immediately relevant to younger U.S. ho

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Unifies Enhanced Conversions Settings in 2026: What Changes in April and June, What Advertisers Need to Do, and How to Prepare
item.description: Google Ads is simplifying one of the more confusing parts of conversion measurement. In 2026, Google is unifying enhanced conversions settings so advertisers no longer have to think about enhanced conversions for web and enhanced conversions for leads as separate setup paths inside the interface.

item.title: [General] Do Outbound Links Hurt SEO? What Google Says About Poor Signals, Link Spam, and External Linking Best Practices
item.description: If you publish SEO content, manage an editorial site, or oversee a company blog, you have probably heard some version of this warning: be careful who you link to, because bad outbound links can send poor signals and hurt your rankings. That idea has circulated in SEO for years. It shows up in aud

item.description: The first ten days of April 2026 gave marketers a concentrated look at where digital marketing is actually heading, not in theory, but in product rollouts, ranking changes, ad infrastructure updates, and platform signals that affect day-to-day execution. The biggest theme was not simply “AI is gr

item.description: Instantly identify top-ranking pages and keywords your competitors use. AI does the heavy lifting, saving you hours of research time. Perfect for SaaS businesses. #KeywordResearch #SaaS #AI #SEO #MarketingStrategy

item.title: [General] 不正クリック対策、本当に必要？アドフラウドの専門家と広告運用者に率直に聞いてみた
item.description:

item.title: [General] HubSpot UNBOUND: Why INBOUND Became UNBOUND and What the Conference Change Means for Modern Go-To-Market Teams

That is why HubSpot’s

item.title: [General] Akamai’s Publishing AI Botnet Report: What the 300% Rise in AI Bot Traffic Means for Publishers

That is the main reason it keeps showing up i

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Ads for Nail Salons: Get More Clients! #shorts
item.description: Stop guessing with keywords! Target 'nail salon near me' intent for leads. Use search campaigns, focus on calls, and optimize with conversion tracking. Maximize your budget with smart bidding strategies. #GoogleAds #LocalSEO #LeadGeneration #SmallBusinessMarketing #NailSalonMarketing

item.title: [Meta Ads] Site Links Feature Request
item.description: This is a feature Meta desperately needs. Give advertisers the option of defining site links at an account level so that we don't need to keep removing Meta's suggested site links. It shouldn't be this difficult.

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Ads with $20/Day: Budget Tutorial Revealed #shorts
item.description: Can you really run Google Ads with just $20 per day? We break down when it's possible and when it's impossible to make a small budget work with Google Ads. #GoogleAds #SmallBudget #PPC #DigitalMarketing

item.title: [General] YouTube’s New TV-Style Channels Explained: What Coachella TV Means for Connected TV, Creators, and Brands
item.description: YouTube is testing a format that looks familiar to anyone who has spent time with traditional television or FAST streaming services: always-on, topic-based channels designed for lean-back viewing on connected TVs. The first high-profile example is Coachella TV, a 24/7 stream built around festival

item.title: [General] Ultimate Guide to Using Mailchimp for Email Marketing in 2026: Setup, Automation, Segmentation, Deliverability, and Reporting
item.description: Email marketing is still one of the highest-leverage channels a business can own, but the software alone does not create results. item.title: [General] Disney+ and Hulu Put TV Props on Facebook Marketplace: What “The Drama You Want” Reveals About Modern Streaming Marketing
item.description: Most streaming campaigns still follow a familiar playbook. A trailer drops. Social clips are cut down. Cast interviews circulate. Paid placements follow audiences around the internet. It works, but it is also predictable. That is why Disney+ and Hulu’s latest extension of “The Drama You Want” sta

It becomes a crossover moment between football culture, collectibles, licensed merchandise, and global brand storytelling. That is exactly

item.title: [General] Google Vids Adds AI Avatars, Veo 3.1 Video Generation, Custom Music, and Direct YouTube Publishing
item.description: Google Vids is moving from a lightweight workspace video tool into something much more useful for everyday business communication. item.title: [General] TikTok Financial Services in Brazil: What Its Payments and Credit Plans Mean for Social Commerce, Pix, and Fintech

If the company receives approval to operate in payments and

item.title: [General] Instagram Now Lets Creators Schedule Trial Reels: How the Feature Works, When to Use It, and What It Means for Reach

That may sound like a small product update, but for creators, brands, and social teams, it changes how experimentation can fi

item.title: [General] 4月16日（木）開催／広告LPを効果検証しながら設計する3ステップを解説 コンバージョン率を改善するLPOの考え方とは（無料オンラインセミナー）
item.description:
